items.title: India-Russia pact allows troops and warships on each other's soil
Sangue prima della tregua, 'oltre 20 morti nei raid russi sull'Ucraina'
items.description: Zelensky: 'Da loro solo propaganda'. E Mosca taglia internet prima della parata

items.title: Zelenskyy condemns Russian ‘cynicism’ over parade truce as 23 killed in attacks
items.description: Kyiv berates Moscow’s request for ceasefire while launching ‘missile and drone strikes every single day leading up to it’Volodymyr Zelenskyy has accused the Kremlin of “utter cynicism” for seeking a truce so it can stage a military parade in Moscow as 23 people were killed in attacks on Ukraine.At least 12 people were …

items.title: Putin ‘doesn’t care' about Russians or Ukrainians: ‘Pageantry and symbolism’ over civilian lives
items.description: Rochelle Ferguson Bouyahi is pleased to welcome the Director of the Eurasia Democracy Initiative, Peter Zalmayev, to offer context & perspective on the battlefield dynamics and political theatre of Russia's war on Ukraine. While Russia invokes symbolic gestures tied to historical commemorations, beneath the surface of …

items.title: Iran ceasefire ‘not over,’ US ‘not looking for a fight,’ Hegseth says after Tehran fires on Gulf
items.description: US defense secretary's remarks follow report that Israel, US planning fresh round of strikes on Iran's energy sites, senior officials; Trump: Goals would be achieved in 2-3 weeks if war resumes The post Iran ceasefire ‘not over,’ US ‘not looking for a fight,’ Hegseth says after Tehran fires on Gulf appeared…

items.title: What’s the significance of UAE’s Fujairah, hit on Monday?
items.description: If confirmed, it would be Iran’s first attack on the UAE since the US-Iran ceasefire took effect on April 8.

items.title: UAE Accuses Iran Of Hitting Oil Sector, World Leaders Condemn Dangerous Escalation
items.description: Several countries have condemned Iran and called an attack on oil facilities in the United Arab Emirates a dangerous escalation. Thick smoke was filmed pouring out from the Fujairah Oil Industry Zone that the UAE claimed was hit by an Iranian drone attack on May 4. This comes as both the US and Iran fired shots in the …

items.title: How Colombia became a top exporter of mercenaries
items.description: Every year Colombia retires thousands of battle-hardened veterans from its armed forces. Many end up enlisting in foreign conflicts.

items.title: Education or food? Funding shortfalls force Sudanese refugees in Egypt to ‘make very difficult decisions’
items.description: Civilians who have fled the war in Sudan and sought shelter in neighbouring Egypt could potentially face a new battle – the loss of critical services that ensure their survival, the UN refugee agency, UNHCR, has warned.

items.title: U.K. Targets Russian Army Recruitment Network and Drone Suppliers in Latest Sanctions Package
items.description: The new measures target what British officials condemned as a “barbaric” network that lures foreign nationals to Russia with the promise of work, only to force them into frontline combat in Ukraine or military production.

items.title: Trump Calls Zelensky ‘Tricky Guy’ but Says He ‘Likes’ Him
items.description: US President Donald Trump said he supports a negotiated settlement in the ongoing Russo-Ukrainian War, despite continued battlefield losses for Kyiv.

items.title: Russia declares a truce in Ukraine to mark Victory Day
items.description: Russia declared a unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine for Friday and Saturday to mark the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II, but threatened to strike back at Kyiv if it tries to disrupt festivities.

items.title: Mali's junta and Russia lose ground to jihadists and rebels
items.description: After withdrawing from the town of Kidal at the start of the pro-independence and jihadist offensive on April 26, and then from Tessalit on May 1, Malian and Russian troops have begun pulling out from their base in Aguelhok.

items.title: Russia offers Ukraine May 8-9 ceasefire amid WWII anniversary, but threatens major reprisals in same breath
items.description: President Putin has unilaterally declared a two-day truce amid commemorations of the end of World War II in Moscow. Ukraine's President Zelenskyy proposed his own truce starting a couple of days earlier.

items.title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
items.description: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.
